hooks.command: $i = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($i.tool_input.isolation -eq 'worktree') { @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PreToolUse'; permissionDecision = 'deny'; permissionDecisionReason = 'Agent isolation:worktree is disabled in this repo (leaves stray worktrees under .claude/worktrees/). Retry the Agent call without the isolation parameter.' } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress }
